tasks.title: Bootstrap pnpm Workspace and Development Environment
tasks.description: Set up the foundational workspace structure with pnpm workspaces, dev-container configuration, and initial tooling
tasks.details: Create root package.json with pnpm workspace configuration. Set up dev-container with Node 20, pnpm 9, Oh-My-Zsh, and Claude CLI. Configure TypeScript 5, Vitest, and Turbo in workspace root. Add pnpm overrides for three@0.176.0, react@19.1.0, @react-three/fiber@^9.1.2. Create initial directory structure: packages/schema, packages/ops, packages/store, packages/canvas, packages/input, packages/widgets, apps/hello-sdk. Set up .env.example with OPENAI_API_KEY and ELEVEN_LABS_API_KEY stubs.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify workspace setup by running 'pnpm -r run build' and 'pnpm -r exec vitest run' commands successfully. Confirm dev-container builds and all specified tools are available.

tasks.title: Implement Schema Package with Zod Definitions
tasks.description: Create the foundational Schema package with TypeScript types generated from Zod schema definitions for IdeaNode and edges
tasks.details: Create packages/schema with package.json, tsconfig.json, and src/index.ts. Define IdeaNode interface with open metadata: Record<string, unknown> field using Zod schemas. Create edge type definitions and graph structure types. Export all TypeScript types generated from Zod definitions. Set up build scripts to compile TypeScript and generate type declarations. Configure ESLint rules to enforce package boundaries.
tasks.testStrategy: Achieve ≥80% unit test coverage using Vitest. Test schema validation, type inference, and edge case handling. Verify TypeScript compilation produces correct .d.ts files.

tasks.title: Develop Ops Package with Graph Algorithms
tasks.description: Implement graph algorithm utilities including BFS, Interwingle, and other functional operations on Schema objects
tasks.details: Create packages/ops depending on @refinery/schema. Implement BFS (Breadth-First Search) algorithm for graph traversal. Add Interwingle algorithm for graph operations. Create functional utilities for graph queries, node filtering, edge traversal, and graph transformations. All functions should operate on Schema objects and return immutable results. Export clean functional API surface with zero any-casts.
tasks.testStrategy: Achieve ≥80% unit test coverage with comprehensive algorithm testing. Test performance with 1k-node graphs. Verify all operations maintain immutability and type safety.

tasks.title: Build Store Package with Zustand State Management
tasks.description: Migrate from monolithic reducer to Zustand slice-based global state management system
tasks.details: Store package implementation is complete with Zustand slice-based state management, typed actions using RendererCommand pattern, memoized selectors, immutable state updates, persistence helpers, and comprehensive test coverage. Package builds successfully with TypeScript and is ready for integration by other packages.
tasks.testStrategy: All tests passing (117/117). Unit tests cover store actions, state mutations, persistence, hydration, and performance with large state objects.

tasks.title: Create Canvas Package React-Three Renderer Facade
tasks.description: Abstract away r3f-forcegraph with a clean Canvas facade that publishes enqueue(cmd) API
tasks.details: Create packages/canvas depending on @refinery/store. Abstract react-three-fiber and r3f-forcegraph behind clean facade. Implement enqueue(cmd) API that consumes RendererCommand objects from Store. Create Canvas React component that renders 3D graph visualization. Handle GPU rendering optimizations for 60 FPS performance with 1k-node graphs. Add accessibility features including keyboard navigation and screen-reader labels for WCAG 2.2 AA compliance. Switch from Jest to Vitest for Canvas tests to avoid ESM crashes.
tasks.testStrategy: Test Canvas component rendering with mock data. Verify 60 FPS performance with 1k-node test dataset. Test accessibility features with screen readers and keyboard navigation.

tasks.title: Implement Input Hub for Multimodal Control
tasks.description: Create unified gesture and voice intent bus using Mediapipe Hands and Eleven Labs integration
tasks.details: Create packages/input with Mediapipe Vision integration for hand gesture recognition. Integrate Eleven Labs for voice command processing. Create unified intent bus that maps gestures and voice commands to intent enum. Implement event handling system that translates multimodal inputs to graph operations. Add support for public/mediapipe/hand_landmarker.task and .wasm assets. Create intent classification system for graph manipulation commands.
tasks.testStrategy: Test gesture recognition accuracy with various hand positions. Verify voice command processing and intent mapping. Test multimodal input coordination and conflict resolution.

tasks.title: Set up GitHub Actions CI Pipeline
tasks.description: Implement automated CI workflow for builds, tests, and quality gates
tasks.details: Create .github/workflows/ci.yml with GitHub Actions workflow. Configure ubuntu-latest runners with Node 20. Implement job steps: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, pnpm -r run build, pnpm -r exec vitest run. Add coverage reporting and quality gates requiring ≥80% coverage on Schema and Ops packages. Set up build artifact caching and parallel job execution. Configure status checks and branch protection rules.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify CI pipeline runs successfully on push and pull request events. Test failure scenarios and coverage thresholds. Confirm all packages build and test in CI environment.

tasks.title: Create Demo App Hello-SDK
tasks.description: Build demonstration application showcasing 1k-node graph rendering at ≥60 FPS
tasks.details: Create apps/hello-sdk React application demonstrating SDK integration. Import @refinery/schema, @refinery/canvas-r3f, and other packages. Load test-assets/data/23-nodes.json and generate 1k-node dataset for performance testing. Implement graph rendering with Canvas component achieving ≥60 FPS target. Add performance monitoring and FPS display. Include feature flag for degrading to 30 FPS on low-end hardware. Create live documentation through interactive examples.
tasks.testStrategy: Performance test with 1k-node graph on various hardware configurations. Verify 60 FPS target achievement. Test fallback to 30 FPS degradation mode.

tasks.title: Implement Widgets Package UI Components
tasks.description: Create reusable UI widget components for graph interaction and control interfaces
tasks.details: Create packages/widgets with reusable React components for graph interaction. Implement overlay controls for Canvas with keyboard navigation support. Create node inspection panels, graph navigation controls, and visualization settings. Ensure all widgets follow accessibility guidelines with proper ARIA labels and keyboard support. Design components to be theme-able and customizable for external integrators.
tasks.testStrategy: Test widget functionality and accessibility compliance. Verify keyboard navigation and screen reader compatibility. Test widget integration with Canvas component.

tasks.title: Re-enable ops tsc-b build
tasks.description: The TypeScript build for the `ops` package was disabled to achieve a baseline green build. This task is to re-enable and fix any resulting TypeScript errors.

tasks.title: Restore disabled test suites in store / input / widgets
tasks.description: Test suites in the store, input, and widgets packages were disabled to achieve a baseline green build. This task is to re-enable them and fix any failing tests.

tasks.title: Generate Documentation and Achieve Coverage Targets
tasks.description: Set up TypeDoc generation, achieve ≥80% test coverage, and create comprehensive documentation
tasks.details: Configure TypeDoc for automatic API documentation generation across all packages. Ensure Schema and Ops packages achieve ≥80% unit test coverage requirement. Create comprehensive README files for each package with usage examples. Set up documentation website or GitHub Pages for API reference. Add code examples and integration guides for external developers. Configure coverage reporting in CI pipeline with enforcement of coverage thresholds.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify TypeDoc generates complete API documentation. Confirm coverage reports show ≥80% for Schema and Ops packages. Test documentation examples work correctly when followed by external developers.

tasks.title: Fix stalling clustering test in ops package
tasks.description: Investigate and resolve the clustering test that is causing timeouts or infinite loops in the ops package test suite.
tasks.details: Analyze the failing clustering test in packages/ops to identify the root cause of stalling behavior. Common issues include infinite loops in graph traversal algorithms, memory leaks in recursive functions, or incorrect termination conditions in clustering algorithms. Review the clustering implementation for proper handling of edge cases like disconnected graphs, self-loops, or circular references. Ensure proper timeout handling and resource cleanup in test scenarios. Update test data if needed to avoid pathological cases that cause performance degradation. Add debugging output to identify where the test hangs and implement proper error handling for edge cases.
tasks.testStrategy: Run the specific clustering test in isolation to reproduce the stalling behavior. Add timeout limits to prevent infinite execution. Create unit tests for edge cases including empty graphs, single-node graphs, and disconnected components. Verify clustering algorithm correctness with known test datasets. Test performance with various graph sizes to ensure O(n) or O(n log n) complexity. Run full ops package test suite to ensure fix doesn't break other functionality.

tasks.title: Test taskmaster functionality
tasks.description: Verify that taskmaster commands work correctly for task management including listing, updating status, and displaying task details.
tasks.details: Test all taskmaster CLI commands to ensure proper functionality. Verify 'task-master list' displays tasks correctly with proper formatting, status indicators, and priority levels. Test 'task-master next' returns the highest priority pending task. Verify 'task-master show <id>' displays complete task details including description, implementation details, test strategy, and dependencies. Test 'task-master set-status --id=<id> --status=<status>' updates task status correctly for all valid statuses (pending, in-progress, done). Test 'task-master update' command for modifying task properties. Verify error handling for invalid task IDs, invalid status values, and malformed commands. Test that task dependencies are properly displayed and respected. Ensure JSON file integrity is maintained after all operations.
tasks.testStrategy: Run each taskmaster command with valid and invalid inputs to verify proper behavior and error handling. Test edge cases like non-existent task IDs, invalid status values, and concurrent access scenarios. Verify that the tasks.json file remains valid JSON after all operations. Test the command output formatting for readability and consistency. Verify that task dependencies are correctly resolved and displayed.

tasks.title: Phase-1 Build & Config Convergence (worktree: cv-build)
tasks.description: Align webpack/Three resolution, merge Tailwind config, copy data bundles (excluding graph.automerge) into cryptiq-mindmap, and ensure monorepo builds clean.
tasks.testStrategy: `pnpm build` succeeds without --skipLibCheck; `/api/health` route returns 200.

tasks.title: Phase-2 SDK Integration (worktree: cv-integrate)
tasks.description: Wire IdeaCanvas + GraphForgeLoader to `/api/mindmap`, render 71-node graph at ≥60 FPS.
tasks.testStrategy: Dev server loads without errors; RTL smoke test renders canvas; FPS overlay ≥60 for 10 s.

tasks.title: Phase-3 Optimise & Test (worktree: cv-optimize)
tasks.description: Scale to 1 k nodes, port CategoryHUD/TimeSlider, add vitest + coverage ≥80 % and deploy preview.
tasks.testStrategy: Preview URL renders 1 k nodes ≥60 FPS; CI passes with coverage gate.

tasks.title: Refactor Documentation Structure
tasks.description: Reorganize repository documentation into a unified docs hierarchy and configure Typedoc output.
tasks.details:
1. Create docs/architecture and docs/guides directories.
2. Move existing documentation files into the appropriate subfolders.
3. Add docs/index.md navigation hub.
4. Configure typedoc.json with "out": "docs/reference" and correct entry points.
5. Update .gitignore to ignore .taskmaster/docs.
6. Ensure package.json docs script builds into docs/reference.
tasks.testStrategy: Run pnpm docs and tm validate without errors.

metadata.description: Documentation and quality assurance specialist agent

tasks.title: Build Store Package with Zustand State Management
tasks.description: Migrate from monolithic reducer to Zustand slice-based global state management system
tasks.details: Create packages/store depending on @refinery/schema and @refinery/ops. Replace monolithic reducer with Zustand slices for graph state management. Implement typed actions that emit RendererCommand objects consumed by UI layers. Remove forceGraphRef coupling and global eventMux dependencies. Create state selectors and actions for graph manipulation. Ensure all state changes are immutable and properly typed.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit test all store actions and state mutations. Test state persistence and hydration. Verify performance with large state objects and frequent updates.

metadata.description: Algorithms and state management specialist agent

tasks.title: Create Canvas Package React-Three Renderer Facade
tasks.description: Abstract away r3f-forcegraph with a clean Canvas facade that publishes enqueue(cmd) API
tasks.details: Create packages/canvas depending on @refinery/store. Abstract react-three-fiber and r3f-forcegraph behind clean facade. Implement enqueue(cmd) API that consumes RendererCommand objects from Store. Create Canvas React component that renders 3D graph visualization. Handle GPU rendering optimizations for 60 FPS performance with 1k-node graphs. Add accessibility features including keyboard navigation and screen-reader labels for WCAG 2.2 AA compliance. Switch from Jest to Vitest for Canvas tests to avoid ESM crashes.
tasks.testStrategy: Test Canvas component rendering with mock data. Verify 60 FPS performance with 1k-node test dataset. Test accessibility features with screen readers and keyboard navigation.

subtasks.title: Setup Canvas package structure
subtasks.description: Create the foundational package structure for the Canvas rendering system with proper directory organization, build configuration, and module exports
subtasks.details: Establish packages/canvas directory structure, configure TypeScript build, setup package.json with dependencies for react-three-fiber, three.js, and related packages. Create index.ts with proper exports and establish core directory structure (components/, hooks/, utils/, types/).

subtasks.title: Abstract react-three-fiber/r3f-forcegraph behind facade
subtasks.description: Create abstraction layer to encapsulate react-three-fiber and r3f-forcegraph libraries behind a clean interface
subtasks.details: Design and implement facade pattern to abstract 3D rendering libraries. Create RendererFacade class that wraps react-three-fiber and r3f-forcegraph functionality, providing simplified API for graph rendering operations while hiding implementation details.

subtasks.title: Implement RendererCommand consumption system
subtasks.description: Build command pattern system to handle rendering operations through structured commands
subtasks.details: Create RendererCommand interface and command processor to handle rendering operations. Implement command queue system with proper batching, error handling, and state management. Include commands for node/edge creation, updates, and deletions.

subtasks.title: Create React Canvas component
subtasks.description: Develop the main React component that integrates the rendering system with React application
subtasks.details: Build Canvas React component that uses the RendererCommand system and facade. Implement proper React lifecycle management, ref handling, and integration with the command processing system. Include props interface for configuration and event handling.

subtasks.title: Optimize for 60 FPS performance with 1k nodes
subtasks.description: Implement performance optimizations to achieve 60 FPS rendering with 1000+ nodes
subtasks.details: Implement level-of-detail (LOD) rendering, frustum culling, instanced rendering for similar nodes, and efficient update batching. Add performance monitoring, memory management optimizations, and implement viewport-based rendering to maintain 60 FPS with 1k+ nodes.

subtasks.title: Implement accessibility features for WCAG compliance
subtasks.description: Add comprehensive accessibility features to meet WCAG compliance standards
subtasks.details: Implement ARIA labels, keyboard navigation support, screen reader compatibility, high contrast mode, focus management, and semantic HTML structure. Add accessibility testing and ensure compliance with WCAG 2.1 AA standards for 3D graph visualization.

tasks.title: Create Demo App Hello-SDK
tasks.description: Build demonstration application showcasing 1k-node graph rendering at ≥60 FPS
tasks.details: Create apps/hello-sdk React application demonstrating SDK integration. Import @refinery/schema, @refinery/canvas-r3f, and other packages. Load test-assets/data/23-nodes.json and generate 1k-node dataset for performance testing. Implement graph rendering with Canvas component achieving ≥60 FPS target. Add performance monitoring and FPS display. Include feature flag for degrading to 30 FPS on low-end hardware. Create live documentation through interactive examples.
tasks.testStrategy: Performance test with 1k-node graph on various hardware configurations. Verify 60 FPS target achievement. Test fallback to 30 FPS degradation mode.

subtasks.title: Setup React app structure and dependencies
subtasks.description: Initialize React application with proper project structure, install required dependencies for canvas rendering, performance monitoring, and feature flags
subtasks.details: Create React app structure with components folder, install dependencies like React, canvas libraries, performance monitoring tools, and feature flag management libraries

subtasks.title: Implement test data loading and 1k-node dataset generation
subtasks.description: Create data generation utilities to produce 1000-node datasets with appropriate properties for canvas rendering and performance testing
subtasks.details: Build data generators that create realistic node datasets with positions, connections, and properties suitable for performance benchmarking

subtasks.title: Integrate Canvas component with performance monitoring
subtasks.description: Connect the canvas rendering component with performance monitoring to track FPS and rendering metrics during node visualization
subtasks.details: Implement FPS tracking, render time measurement, and performance metrics collection while rendering the 1k-node dataset on canvas

subtasks.title: Implement feature flags for FPS degradation on low-end hardware
subtasks.description: Add feature flag system to simulate or handle FPS degradation scenarios on low-end hardware, ensuring 60 FPS target with 1k nodes
subtasks.details: Create feature flags to toggle performance optimizations, implement degradation simulation, and ensure the demo maintains 60 FPS with 1000 nodes as success criteria

tasks.title: Implement Widgets Package UI Components
tasks.description: Create reusable UI widget components for graph interaction and control interfaces
tasks.details: Create packages/widgets with reusable React components for graph interaction. Implement overlay controls for Canvas with keyboard navigation support. Create node inspection panels, graph navigation controls, and visualization settings. Ensure all widgets follow accessibility guidelines with proper ARIA labels and keyboard support. Design components to be theme-able and customizable for external integrators.
tasks.testStrategy: Test widget functionality and accessibility compliance. Verify keyboard navigation and screen reader compatibility. Test widget integration with Canvas component.

subtasks.title: Setup Widgets Package Structure
subtasks.description: Create the foundational package structure for the Widgets package including build configuration, entry points, and basic component exports
subtasks.details: Set up package.json, TypeScript configuration, build scripts, and create the main entry point with initial component structure. Establish proper module exports and package boundaries.

subtasks.title: Create Core Graph Interaction Components
subtasks.description: Implement overlay controls and navigation components for graph interaction functionality
subtasks.details: Build React components for graph overlay controls, navigation elements, zoom controls, and pan functionality. Ensure components are properly integrated with the graph visualization system.

subtasks.title: Implement Accessibility Features
subtasks.description: Add comprehensive accessibility support with ARIA labels and full keyboard navigation
subtasks.details: Implement ARIA attributes, keyboard event handlers, focus management, screen reader support, and ensure all interactive elements meet WCAG guidelines. Add proper semantic markup and announcements.

subtasks.title: Design Theming System
subtasks.description: Create a flexible theming architecture that allows external integrators to customize widget appearance
subtasks.details: Build CSS-in-JS or CSS custom properties based theming system with design tokens, color schemes, typography options, and component style overrides. Provide clear theming API for external consumers.

metadata.description: 3D rendering and UI components specialist agent

tasks.title: Implement Input Hub for Multimodal Control
tasks.description: Create unified gesture and voice intent bus using Mediapipe Hands and Eleven Labs integration
tasks.details: Create packages/input with Mediapipe Vision integration for hand gesture recognition. Integrate Eleven Labs for voice command processing. Create unified intent bus that maps gestures and voice commands to intent enum. Implement event handling system that translates multimodal inputs to graph operations. Add support for public/mediapipe/hand_landmarker.task and .wasm assets. Create intent classification system for graph manipulation commands.
tasks.testStrategy: Test gesture recognition accuracy with various hand positions. Verify voice command processing and intent mapping. Test multimodal input coordination and conflict resolution.

subtasks.title: Setup Input Package Structure
subtasks.description: Create the foundational package structure for the multimodal input system with proper TypeScript configuration and module organization
subtasks.details: Create packages/input directory with src/, tests/, and proper package.json. Setup TypeScript configuration extending root tsconfig. Define core interfaces for input handlers, intent types, and event structures. Create index files for clean exports.

subtasks.title: Integrate MediaPipe Vision SDK
subtasks.description: Install and configure MediaPipe Vision for hand gesture recognition with WebAssembly assets
subtasks.details: Install @mediapipe/tasks-vision package. Configure WebAssembly file serving and loading. Create MediaPipe initialization service with proper error handling. Setup camera access permissions and video stream handling. Implement gesture model loading with fallback mechanisms.

subtasks.title: Implement Hand Gesture Recognition
subtasks.description: Create hand tracking and gesture detection system using MediaPipe's hand landmarker
subtasks.details: Implement HandGestureDetector class with real-time hand landmark detection. Create gesture classification logic for common gestures (point, grab, swipe, pinch). Add confidence thresholds and gesture smoothing. Implement gesture event emitter with debouncing.

subtasks.title: Integrate Eleven Labs Voice API
subtasks.description: Setup Eleven Labs SDK for voice processing and text-to-speech capabilities
subtasks.details: Install elevenlabs SDK and configure API authentication. Create VoiceProcessor service with API key management. Implement voice synthesis methods with voice selection. Add audio playback handling with Web Audio API. Create error handling for API limits and failures.

subtasks.title: Create Unified Intent Bus System
subtasks.description: Build central event bus for coordinating intents from multiple input sources
subtasks.details: Implement IntentBus class using EventEmitter pattern. Define Intent interface with source, type, confidence, and payload. Create intent priority and conflict resolution system. Add intent history tracking and replay capabilities. Implement intent filtering and subscription management.

subtasks.title: Implement Gesture-to-Intent Mapping
subtasks.description: Create mapping system to convert detected gestures into application intents
subtasks.details: Build GestureIntentMapper with configurable gesture-to-intent rules. Create default mapping profiles for common interactions. Implement context-aware gesture interpretation. Add gesture combination support for complex intents. Create gesture calibration and customization system.

subtasks.title: Implement Voice-to-Intent Mapping
subtasks.description: Build voice command processing and intent extraction system
subtasks.details: Create VoiceIntentParser using natural language processing. Implement command grammar definition system. Add voice command confidence scoring. Create voice feedback system using Eleven Labs TTS. Implement voice command history and learning.

subtasks.title: Create Multimodal Coordination System
subtasks.description: Implement system to coordinate and fuse inputs from multiple modalities
subtasks.details: Build MultimodalCoordinator to handle simultaneous gesture and voice inputs. Implement modality fusion logic with temporal alignment. Create conflict resolution for competing intents. Add multimodal gesture support (voice + gesture combinations). Implement performance monitoring and optimization.
